trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "That one has a bright future — perfect instincts for the rhythm of mayhem." — Judith [Scryfall]. The speaker is Judith, the Scourge Diva (RNA-185), legendary Rakdos Human Shaman and de facto guild speaker in most circumstances. Judith appears at Rakdos clubs and street shows as a singer and performance artist; she shows up during the final act when performances shift into pain [WebSearch snippet via MTG Wiki Fandom: Judith]. This flavor text places Judith as a talent-spotter watching the Roustabout perform.
sources: MTG Wiki Fandom: Judith via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Typed as Ogre Warrior. The Rakdos Cult on Ravnica uses their public performances — circus acts, street shows, and violence spectacles — as a protected right; the Guildpact stipulates that if an audience gathers voluntarily, the performance is sanctioned. The Roustabout's blocked-creature trigger (dealing 1 damage to the player being attacked) mechanically simulates the Rakdos doctrine that no act should go unbloodied [Scryfall; magic.wizards.com: Ravnica Allegiance Mechanics, Spectacle section].

Pauper-legal common, EDHREC rank 25,275 — extremely low Commander inclusion. Its niche is mono-red aggressive or Rakdos aggro builds where unblockable chip damage matters. The ability is sometimes cited in community discussions as a design model for the Spectacle keyword enabler: getting that 1 damage through triggers Spectacle for follow-up plays [r/magicTCG community mentions; Scryfall].

related_cards.name: Judith, the Scourge Diva
related_cards.note: The flavor-text speaker; legendary Rakdos commander who buffs non-token creatures and deals damage on their death

related_cards.name: Carnival Hellsteed
related_cards.note: Rakdos mounted performer; shares circus-performance register and Rakdos guild affiliation

related_cards.name: Spear Spewer
